creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #277)

"I need the": should have said:

I'd need the list of *.ko's that had been
loaded to still be present in order to get
what I was after.

I'll note that I fully understand if you do not
want to try to produce such.

If you did try it, I do not know which would be
better after the dump if it nicely gets back
to the ddb> prompt: doing a continue from the
ddb> prompt vs. doing a reboot or such.
